product_overview: Q360 is a 360-degree performance evaluation platform for public-sector organizations. It supports authenticated access to system status checks and user notifications, with JWT-based API authentication as the gateway to protected data.
core_goals: Obtain a JWT access token to call protected APIs
Refresh an existing JWT token before it expires

features.name: Authentication API
features.description: Users can obtain and refresh JWT tokens for accessing protected API endpoints.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/auth/token/ -> Submit valid username and password -> Receive JWT access and refresh tokens
Navigate to /api/auth/token/refresh/ -> Submit a valid refresh token -> Receive a new access token

features.name: Notifications API
features.description: Authenticated users can retrieve their notification list and unread notification count.
user_flows: Navigate to /api/notifications/ -> Provide valid authentication token -> See the list of notifications
Navigate to /api/unread-count/ -> Provide valid authentication token -> See the unread notification count

features.name: System Health Checks
features.description: Users can check whether the system is healthy and ready to serve requests.
user_flows: Navigate to /health/ -> See the system health status
Navigate to /ready/ -> See the system readiness status

features.name: Notifications API
features.description: Fetch unread counts and notifications for authenticated user
